## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are completed before requesting review -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
- [ ] I have run `terraform fmt -recursive` on all Terraform files
- [ ] I have run `terraform validate` on the configuration
- [ ] No sensitive information (keys, credentials, secrets) is included
- [ ] All variables have proper descriptions and validation rules
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md file (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated cost estimates if my changes affect AWS costs
- [ ] I have followed security best practices

## Security Considerations
<!-- Describe any security implications of your changes -->

- [ ] This change modifies security groups or network policies
- [ ] This change affects data encryption
- [ ] This change introduces new dependencies
- [ ] No security concerns
